---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for DBSutra
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are
experiencing. Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered
and why they are not sufficient.

## Use Case

Describe the specific use case this feature would address. Include details
such as:

- Which database type(s) are involved?
- What workflow does this improve?
- How frequently would you use this feature?

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools to
help illustrate the feature.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request
here.
